def negative_test_fixture_calls_datetime_now_without_freezing():
    rule_id = "test_fixture_calls_datetime_now_without_freezing"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Test fixture or test body calls datetime.now() or datetime.today() without freezegun or similar."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
